title: Hadetoto Baby Blanket 100% Cotton Cellular Blanket Baby Soft Cosy Knitted Blanket Pink 100x80cm
features: 100% PURE COTTON:To protect the baby's sensitive skin, our baby blanket is made of pure cotton and are naturally non-irritating.Even newborn babies can use our knitted baby blankets.

WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS:Our baby blankets are soft and warm, providing the most comfortable environment for your baby, whether it's in a cradle or in a stroller.Our pure cotton blankets come in three colors to choose from, suitable for any occasion.

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Baby blankets easy to Hand wash and gentle machine wash (30c), but don't dry clean don't bleach
ETHICALLY PRODUCED: Every product we sell has been produced to meet the highest industry and quality standards
description: Wrap your little one in pure comfort with this 100% cotton cellular blanket. Measuring a generous 100x80cm, this knitted blanket provides the perfect balance of warmth and breathability for your baby. The cellular knit structure creates small pockets of air that help regulate temperature, making it suitable for use throughout the year. The soft, cosy texture is gentle against delicate skin, whilst the durable cotton construction ensures it maintains its quality wash after wash. Perfect for naptime, bedtime, or as a pram cover, this versatile blanket is an essential addition to your baby's comfort items. The classic design complements any nursery décor, and the practical size offers ample coverage as your baby grows. Hand or machine washable for easy care.
